title: How to Make Heaters for your Pockets, Mittens, Gloves - Whatever!
description: This video shows how to use conductive felt to make safe heaters for your pockets, mittens, gloves - whatever!  The felt is available from https://secure.workingink.co.uk/shop/working-ink-materials/activated-carbon-felt/ Please be sure to get the 5mm option.  There are many more projects over on our youtube working ink channel.
